metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1012
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig 4E-G: In quantitation of immunoelectron microscopy images of isolated rat brain synapses (synaptosomes), latrophilin 1 is predominantly found presynaptically near or on the synaptic cleft, while its ligand Lasso is found postsynaptically.
Fig 4H-I: Synaptic biochemical fractions were separated into presynaptic and postsynaptic fractions, which confirmed presynaptic localization of latrophilin 1.
Fig 5: Latrophilin expressed in HEK293 cells and cocultured with rat neurons induced postsynaptic PSD95 clustering in en passent neuronal dendrites suggesting a presynaptic localization and function for latrophilin 1

Together with the amino acid sequence this strongly suggest that latrophilin 1 is an integral component of the presynaptic membrane.

12/10/2018 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: - LPH1 constructs (accession nos. JF784349-JF784356) were produced from rat cDNA for LPH1
- Rat brain lysate was used for biochemistry
- Hippocampal neurons were isolated from P0-P2 rats
